nodes.summary: Josephine's lorikeet（Charmosyna josefinae）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Josephine's lorikeet。

nodes.name: Charmosyna
nodes.summary: Charmosyna（Charmosyna）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如Striated lorikeet、Josephine's lorikeet、West Papuan lorikeet等4种鸟类。

nodes.name: Josephine's lorikeet
nodes.summary: Josephine's lorikeet (Charmosyna josefinae) is a species of parrot in the family Psittaculidae. It is found in the highlands of New Guinea (central range and Cyclops Mountains). Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. Description Josephine's lorikeet is red with green wings, a yellow-tipped tail, dusky blue, orange bill, yellow eyes, and black flanks. Diet It feeds on nectar, pollen, flower buds, and sometimes soft fruits. References
